items.name: Braised Lamb Shank
items.description: Slow-braised lamb shank with seasonal vegetables, mashed potato and rich demi-glace sauce.

items.name: Chicken Wings Arrabiata
items.description: Crispy chicken wings glazed in a spicy tomato arrabiata sauce, served with fresh herbs.

items.name: Shrimp Pasta
items.description: Angel hair pasta with tiger prawns in a rich tomato-cream sauce, topped with parmesan and garlic bread.

items.name: Club Sandwich
items.description: Triple-decker club sandwich with grilled chicken, bacon, lettuce, tomato, served with crispy fries.

items.name: Crispy Onion Rings
items.description: Golden beer-battered onion rings served with house-made tartar sauce and a garden side.

items.name: Chicken Croquettes
items.description: Three pan-fried chicken croquettes drizzled with creamy white sauce and fresh parsley.

items.name: Chicken Rolls
items.description: Herb-seasoned chicken rolls filled with spinach and carrot, served with spicy dipping sauce.

items.name: Bruschetta Selection
items.description: Toasted sourdough with seasonal toppings — classic tomato-basil, mushroom truffle and smoked salmon.

items.name: Crème Brûlée
items.description: Classic French vanilla custard with a perfectly caramelised sugar crust, served with fresh berries.

items.name: Chocolate Fondant
items.description: Warm dark chocolate lava cake with a molten centre, served with vanilla bean ice cream.

items.name: Tiramisu
items.description: Traditional Italian tiramisu with espresso-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.

items.name: Seasonal Fruit Tart
items.description: Buttery tart shell with pastry cream topped with the finest seasonal fruits.

items.name: Tiger Prawn Pasta
items.description: Jumbo tiger prawns in a rich tomato-cream linguine, finished with parmesan and toasted ciabatta.

items.name: Grilled Sea Bass
items.description: Whole sea bass grilled over open flame with lemon-caper butter and seasonal greens.

items.name: Seafood Platter
items.description: A generous selection of prawns, calamari, fish and mussels with three house-made dipping sauces.

items.name: Calamari Fritti
items.description: Lightly battered crispy squid rings served with lemon aioli and fresh parsley.

items.name: Signature Spritz
items.description: House-crafted Aperol spritz with fresh orange, rosemary and premium prosecco.

items.name: Classic Margarita
items.description: Tequila, fresh lime juice and triple sec with a salted rim, served straight up.

items.name: Blackberry Bramble
items.description: Gin, fresh blackberries, lemon juice and elderflower cordial over crushed ice.

items.name: Dirty Martini
items.description: Premium vodka with olive brine and a twist, served ice-cold in a chilled coupe glass.
